id: internal UUID in DB for artifact
name: Sring Display name of artifact
source: String source name limited to 5 options ['Ancient Magitech', 'Divine', 'Nightmare', 'Prototype Magitech', 'Void']
description: String Description of physical appearance of artifact
effect: String Effect of artifact when used
slots: Positive INT number of inventory slots artifact takes up
hasDepletion: Boolean if artifact depletes or not
depletionDie: String depletion roll for artifact, e.g. 1d10
depletionResult: Postive INT, value of die roll that will deplete artifact
